name: Banking
description: Bank reconciliations, FD renewals, signatory maintenance, OD / LC / BG tracking and FEMA-related bank filings.

items.title: Daily bank balance check
items.description: Pull closing balances across all current accounts, flag any unexpected debits or returns.
items.notes: Reconcile against Tally bank ledgers during EOD.

items.title: Weekly bank reconciliation
items.description: Reconcile all current accounts with bank statements; investigate un-presented cheques and uncleared entries.

items.title: Month-end bank reconciliation sign-off
items.description: Formal BRS for every bank account, signed off by Accounts Manager.

items.title: Bank charges & interest review
items.description: Review bank charges, forex conversion fees and OD interest; dispute errors with RM.

items.title: FD maturity / renewal tracker
items.description: Review FDs maturing in the next 30 days; decide on renewal, laddering or liquidation.

items.title: OD / CC limit utilisation review
items.description: Review working-capital limit utilisation, drawing power, stock statement filings.
items.notes: Stock statements generally due by the 10th of the following month.

items.title: Submit stock & debtor statement to bank
items.description: Monthly stock and debtor statement for working capital drawing power calculation.

items.title: Signatory mandate review
items.description: Verify authorised signatories, limits and DSC validity across all banks.

items.title: Bank Guarantee / LC register
items.description: Update BG and LC register — issue date, expiry, margin, beneficiary, claim status.

items.title: Clear aged unreconciled entries
items.description: Investigate and close bank entries pending reconciliation for > 90 days.

items.title: FLA return (RBI)
items.description: Annual Foreign Liabilities & Assets return for companies with FDI / ODI.

items.title: Working capital facility renewal
items.description: Annual renewal of CC / OD limits with consortium bank — prepare CMA data.

items.title: Bank KYC refresh
items.description: Periodic KYC updation for company and directors as required by banks.
